query:
INSERT INTO profiles (id, username, status, display_name)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
            ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE
                SET id = profiles.id
            RETURNING
                id,
                username,
                display_name,
                avatar_url,
                status,
                custom_status,
                bio,
                banner_url,
                pending_avatar_url,
                avatar_moderation_status::text AS "avatar_moderation_status!",
                pending_banner_url,
                banner_moderation_status::text AS "banner_moderation_status!",
                EXISTS(
                    SELECT 1 FROM user_badges ub
                    WHERE ub.user_id = profiles.id AND ub.badge = 'founding'
                ) AS "is_founding!",
                created_at,
                updated_at
